name: decision package: writes a plain-language decision summary
command:
cat > opts.json <<'JEOF'
{"option_count":2,"recommended_option_id":"opt-balanced","options":[{"option_id":"opt-balanced","summary":"Balanced hybrid","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az","monitoring"]},{"option_id":"opt-cost","summary":"Cost-optimized","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest","backup"]}]}
JEOF
cat > scoring.json <<'JEOF'
{"recommended_option_id":"opt-balanced","scored_options":[{"option_id":"opt-balanced","summary":"Balanced hybrid","scores":{"cost_effective":0.6,"performance_optimized":0.6,"customer_centric":0.85,"shareholder_centric":0.7},"total_score":0.7},{"option_id":"opt-cost","summary":"Cost-optimized","scores":{"cost_effective":1.0,"performance_optimized":0.6,"customer_centric":0.5,"shareholder_centric":0.86},"total_score":0.74}]}
JEOF
cat > tc.json <<'JEOF'
{"platform":"aws","recommendations":[{"category":"iac","tool":"terraform"},{"category":"observability","tool":"opentelemetry"}]}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/decision-package.sh" --options opts.json --scoring scoring.json --toolchain tc.json --out dp.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
test -f decision.md && grep -q 'Architecture Decision' decision.md && grep -q 'Decision: adopt' decision.md && echo decision-md 1>&2
